title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people at the beach. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A family is spending time on a sandy beach. Two children are building a sandcastle while their parents are sitting under a beach umbrella. There are towels, a ball and the sea in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people buying fruit. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A woman and her young son are buying fruit at an outdoor market. The woman is holding a bag of apples and speaking to the seller. There are colourful boxes of fruit on the stall.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
